title: escallonia × rigida
intro: Escallonia × rigida, also known as Escallonia × intermedia 'Red Dream', is a hybrid plant species in the Escalloniaceae family, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and attractive foliage. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Escallonia × rigida have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation, due to their antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Escallonia × rigida include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice in natural remedies. Escallonia × rigida can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, but caution should be exercised as it may cause skin irritation in some individuals.
